## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run audit:docs`
- [ ] `npm run audit:static`
- [ ] `npm run handoff:verify` when the change affects shipped behavior or release readiness

## Documentation Impact

- [ ] README or docs were updated in this PR
- [ ] No documentation update was needed for this change

## UI Evidence

- [ ] Screenshots or screen recordings included for visible UI changes
- [ ] Not applicable

- User-facing risk:
- Rollback plan:
